subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150826536 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (INFN Bari) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 462286333/150826536
at 12:52:09.54 UT on 26 August 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to local particles."
